title: Methi Thepla with Cucumber
description: Gujarati fenugreek flatbreads with cucumber and lemon—a portable savory breakfast or travel meal.
explanation: Thepla brings a practical make-ahead wheat option to balance the catalog’s rice and bowl-heavy meals. Keep the cucumber on the side for travel.
ingredients: 1 packed cup Fresh Methi Leaves, finely chopped
instructions: Mix flour, methi, spices, salt, oil, and enough water to make a soft dough. Rest 10 minutes.
Divide and roll into thin discs, dusting with a little flour only as needed.
Cook each thepla on a hot tawa, brushing very lightly with oil, until brown spots appear on both sides.
Season cucumber with lemon and a pinch of salt just before serving.
Serve warm, or cool fully before packing for travel.
